turns.speaker: A
turns.raw_text: Hey B, you watching the stock market lately? Tesla's gonna explode upwards next quarter, mark my words. Easy 50% gain.

turns.speaker: B
turns.raw_text: Whoa, really? That's bold. What makes you say that? They've been kinda volatile.

turns.speaker: A
turns.raw_text: Nah, trust me. Elon just tweeted something about full self-driving being ready soon. And, uh, their sales numbers were good last time, right? It's obvious.

turns.speaker: B
turns.raw_text: I saw the tweet, but didn't they miss earnings estimates a couple months back? And competition from China is heating up.

turns.speaker: A
turns.raw_text: Pfft, earnings? That's old news. Elon's a genius, he always pulls it off. Remember 2020? Stock went nuts. Same thing's happening. Buy now or regret it.

turns.speaker: B
turns.raw_text: Yeah, 2020 was wild, but what about the regulatory stuff with autonomous driving? NHTSA's been poking around. Feels risky.

turns.speaker: A
turns.raw_text: Regulations? Elon fights 'em and wins. Besides, Cybertruck deliveries are ramping up—saw a video of a bunch rolling out. That's huge demand. I'm putting, like, half my portfolio in.

turns.speaker: B
turns.raw_text: Half? Dude, that's aggressive. You got any charts or analyst reports backing this? Or is it just a gut thing?

turns.speaker: A
turns.raw_text: Gut plus vibes, man. Charts are boring, but yeah, I glanced at one—looks like a rocket ship. And battery costs are dropping, so margins will soar. Can't lose.

turns.speaker: B
turns.raw_text: Hmm, battery costs dropping everywhere, not just Tesla. What if there's a recession? EV sales tanked last winter.

turns.speaker: A
turns.raw_text: Recession? Nah, Fed's cutting rates soon. Elon said so indirectly. Tesla's recession-proof anyway—people want those cars bad. I'm telling you, $500 share price by year-end.

turns.speaker: B
turns.raw_text: You're really locked in on this. Okay, maybe I'll dip a toe in, but not half. Ever been wrong on a call like this?

turns.speaker: A
turns.raw_text: Wrong? Psh, not really. GameStop was a win, crypto too. Tesla's my big one now. Just watch, you'll thank me later.

turns.speaker: B
turns.raw_text: Haha, alright, we'll see. Don't say I didn't warn you if it dips.

input.objective: Confident but unsubstantiated Tesla stock prediction
